title: Tries, Prefix Search, and String Algorithms · Invariant Lens: Trie Invariant
summary: Build an autocomplete and route-prefix service with predictable matching behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa trie invariant increment in a Unicode-aware prefix index and matcher. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent shared prefixes, terminal markers, and child transitions without confusing words and prefixes.
Use bounded heaps for top-k, streaming selection, and multiway merge problems.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
